mapper.sql: id, order_sn, member_id, order_type, status, total_amount, pay_amount, freight_amount, promotion_amount, integration_amount, coupon_amount, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, note, pay_type, source_type, create_time, modify_time, payment_time, delivery_time, finish_time, cancel_time, delete_status
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oms_order ( order_sn, member_id, order_type, status, total_amount, pay_amount, freight_amount, promotion_amount, integration_amount, coupon_amount, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, note, pay_type, source_type, create_time, modify_time, delete_status ) VALUES ( #{orderSn}, #{memberId}, #{orderType}, #{status}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{freightAmount}, #{promotionAmount}, #{integrationAmount}, #{couponAmount}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{note}, #{payType}, #{sourceType}, #{createTime}, #{modifyTime}, #{deleteStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM oms_order WHERE order_sn = #{orderSn} AND delete_status = 0
SELECT FROM oms_order WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_status = 0
